_about: Estimated MCP tool-surface cost per server, used by measure.py to compute per-turn token tax. Numbers are approximate observed defaults; edit to refine for your environment. Run `claude mcp list-tools <server>` if your CLI supports it to verify actual counts.

_schema.approx_tools: rough count of tools the server exposes
_schema.approx_schema_bytes: rough total bytes the server's tool schemas add to the system prompt
